channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 82b2f1a9-9593-4498-a824-c209343a28ec
Display name: Azure AI Manager and Namespace RBAC Inference Operator
Description: Allows read access to all objects in an Azure AI Manager namespace, plus the ability to read Secrets and invoke inference against AI models deployed in that namespace. This role does not allow modifying objects, roles, or role bindings. However, the ability to read Secrets allows the holder to obtain ServiceAccount tokens in the namespace. Applying this role at the AI Manager scope will give access across all namespaces.
Link: https://management.azure.com/82b2f1a9-9593-4498-a824-c209343a28ec?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: cc733c34-b633-4850-8d77-77aa26638325
Display name: Provisioned Machine Reader
Description: Grants read-only access to Azure Stack HCI Provisioned Machine resources
Link: https://management.azure.com/cc733c34-b633-4850-8d77-77aa26638325?api-version=2022-04-01
